shared_exclusion_contract.included: first unique, valid, non-zero-length segment record per handle
excluded: segment records with fewer than two points
later duplicate valid records for an already-seen handle

repair.rule: same geometry family stays in one fold; exclude val-side members

family_audit_v1.family_definition: drawing_id OR SHA-256 of endpoint-order-invariant segment geometry normalized for translation, global scale, rotation, and reflection; coordinates quantized to 1/1000 max-bbox span

family_audit_v2.family_definition: drawing_id OR SHA-256 of endpoint-order-invariant segment geometry normalized for translation, global scale, rotation, and reflection; coordinates quantized to 1/1000 max-bbox span
